untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'distance_value' calculated as deviation from mean-reversion reference level using standard deviation multiples. This derived metric is not available in the allowed indicator list. The specific threshold parameter '[THRESHOLD_NEEDED]' in stddev multiples cannot be quantified without additional context. Attempted translation uses price-to-SMA deviation as a proxy, but this does not capture the true mean-reversion logic with dynamic stddev-based thresholds.
translation_notes: Original signal uses a distance metric (likely price deviation from SMA scaled by standard deviation) with configurable threshold multiples to trigger position changes and reversals. Proxy approximation treats crossings of SMA_20 as reversals, but lacks the quantitative threshold mechanism and standard deviation scaling required by the original rule.
